{{Infobox technique
| name = Endless Sword
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

''See also: [[Endless Sword Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The Endless [[Sword]] is a specialized combat [[Path]] centered on the mastery of [[sword aura]] and offensive cutting power. It is characterized by its lack of defensive capabilities, as the [[Path]] focuses entirely on destruction rather than protection. Practitioners utilize techniques to enforce [[madra]] into weapons or even crystallize it into forged constructs, allowing them to gather and manipulate [[aura]] that grows stronger through movement. A core component of the [[Path]] is the [[Flowing Sword technique]], which allows a user to treat their weapon as an extension of their own body to accumulate [[aura]] with every strike. The namesake technique, the Endless [[Sword]], serves as the [[Ruler technique]] for this [[Path]] and is considered the fundamental [[essence]] of its fighting style. Depending on a practitioner's level of mastery, this technique can manifest as a chaotic storm of uncontrolled slashes or more refined, precise strikes described as being like the wind. Advanced applications include aura resonance, where striking one source of [[sword aura]] can trigger a cascading reaction capable of massive destruction. The [[Path]] also features the [[Final Sword]], a powerful technique where the user forges their [[madra]] into a massive, translucent replica of their weapon. While highly effective at shredding targets and creating invisible blades of pressure, the [[Path]] requires significant focus and can be taxing on a user's [[madra]] reserves.}}

== Soulsmith ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Endless Sword]] is a [[Ruler technique]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c3">''Soulsmith'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Yerin]] trains using the [[Endless Sword]] technique.<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c8">''Soulsmith'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|The [[Endless Sword]] is a technique used by [[Yerin]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c17">''Soulsmith'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Blackflame ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Endless Sword]] technique is a [[sword aura]] technique.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18">''Blackflame'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Endless Sword]] can shred dummies in the [[Ruler Trial]].<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c18" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The Endless [[Sword]] is a weapon characterized by distinct levels of mastery. During her training, [[Yerin]] reaches the storm stage of this progression and gains the ability to activate the blade. Once active, the [[sword]] can produce pulses of [[sword]]-[[aura]] that are capable of deflecting incoming attacks. Furthermore, utilizing these pulses requires very little [[madra]] from the wielder.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Endless Sword]] has levels of mastery.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11">''Ghostwater'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]]'s mastery of the [[Endless Sword]] is at the 'storm' stage.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|[[Yerin]] can activate the [[Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c14">''Ghostwater'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Endless Sword]] can produce pulses of [[sword]]-[[aura]].<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17">''Ghostwater'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Endless Sword]] can be used to deflect attacks with pulses.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Endless Sword]] does not take much [[madra]] to use.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c17" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|During a confrontation, [[Yerin]] utilizes the Endless [[Sword]] to suppress an entire room. The technique functions by activating the [[aura]] surrounding both the user and their Goldsigns, manifesting as invisible claws. This power is potent enough to cause trees to explode upon impact. Furthermore, the Endless [[Sword]] can strike with an invisible blade and eventually gathers around [[Yerin]]'s six Goldsigns along with the [[sword]] left by the [[Sword Sage]].}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]] suppresses a room with the [[Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c5">''Underlord'', chapter 5</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Endless Sword]] technique activates the [[aura]] around the user and their Goldsigns.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Endless Sword]] can cause trees to explode.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Endless Sword]] technique uses invisible claws.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Yerin]]'s [[Endless Sword]] can strike with an invisible blade.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|The [[Endless Sword]] gathered around [[Yerin]]'s six Goldsigns and the [[sword]] left by the [[Sword Sage]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Endless Sword]] can be used as a barrier to surround the user in [[sword]]-[[aura]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|The [[Endless Sword]] technique manifests six [[sword]]-arms from [[Yerin]]'s back.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c20">''Uncrowned'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The Endless [[Sword]] is a specialized technique and lineage of which [[Yerin]] serves as the sole heir. This martial art features stages such as [[sword]] like the wind and can manifest through ripples of dense [[sword aura]]. While the [[Sword Sage]] possesses the ability to activate the technique, it has also been utilized by others including the [[Blood Shadow]] and [[Ruby]]. During combat, the power of the Endless [[Sword]] is potent enough to cause deep cuts on both skin and clothing.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">8</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]]'s [[Endless Sword]] causes the cuts on her skin and robe.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1">''Wintersteel'', chapter 1</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Sword Sage]] can activate the [[Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c1" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Endless Sword]] technique has a stage called '[[sword]] like the wind'.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8">''Wintersteel'', chapter 8</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Yerin]] aims to be the next [[Sage of the Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Endless Sword]] is a lineage or group of which [[Yerin]] is the sole heir.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c8" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Blood Shadow]] used the [[Endless Sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c17">''Wintersteel'', chapter 17</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|The [[Endless Sword]] technique rippled through dense [[sword aura]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c22">''Wintersteel'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Endless Sword]] is a technique used by [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Yerin]] trained the [[Endless Sword]] and lost control of it.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Yerin]]'s [[Endless Sword]] technique carries a touch of blood [[aura]] due to her merge with [[Ruby]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c3">''Dreadgod'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Yerin]] used the [[Endless Sword]] to relieve pressure.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c27">''Waybound'', chapter 27</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|The [[Endless Sword]] technique is powered by a [[Monarch]].<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c29">''Waybound'', chapter 29</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Endless Sword]] is not well-suited for defense.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
